docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY SHEVELAND, OFELIA ANGELICA AS TO DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & SERVICE SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2026 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-27-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & SERVICE SAN FRANCISCO
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY SHEVELAND, OFELIA ANGELICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF OFELIA ANGELICA SHEVELAND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & SERVICE SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEVELAND, OFELIA ANGELICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & SERVICE SAN FRANCISCO $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,900.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & SERVICE SAN FRANCISCO
